## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Verified in the browser (`pnpm start` → http://localhost:3000)
- [ ] Updated README or CONTRIBUTING if the change is user-visible
- [ ] Updated `architecture/` in this repo if the file format changed
